title: Kandev plugin registry list
description: Schema for plugin-registry/plugins.yaml — the curated, PR-edited pointer list of plugin repositories in the official Kandev marketplace source. Validated in CI on every PR. Descriptive metadata (name, description, author, version, package URL) is NOT stored here; it is read from each plugin's own GitHub release at index-build time so it can never drift from what actually ships.

plugins.description: The curated list of plugin repositories, one entry per plugin.

id.description: Stable plugin identifier. MUST equal the plugin manifest `id` of the repo's latest release. Unique across the file.

repo.description: GitHub repository in owner/name form; the release source for this plugin.

featured.description: When true, a maintainer has pinned this entry above star order in the catalog.

categories.description: Curation-only category tags used for filtering in the catalog.
